Focus

Personal strengths and intellectual direction.

Muay Thai Training

Personal development

Ongoing

Muay Thai functions as a discipline anchor in my life. It strengthens composure under pressure, consistency, timing, and a more controlled response to stress, all of which carry over into professional settings.

Writing and Intellectual Inquiry

Independent writing and ongoing reflection

Ongoing

Through short-form writing and ongoing reflection, I explore questions around technology, religion, culture, philosophy, and human behavior. That habit sharpens how I organize ideas and articulate them clearly.
